title: Have You Got It Yet? The Story of Syd Barrett and Pink Floyd
original_title: Have You Got It Yet? The Story of Syd Barrett and Pink Floyd
overview: Follow the moment Barrett was kicked out of Pink Floyd, from the narrative of him going from groundbreaking musician to iconic rocker and manic, unstable star.
